item.title: 6.21]為什麼你不該把人生交給「陌生人」...拖延症如何搞砸你的人生？解決拖延Top5招
item.itunes:title: 6.21]為什麼你不該把人生交給「陌生人」...拖延症如何搞砸你的人生？解決拖延Top5招
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wfJ9SQ0b1zI 出國旅遊也是我一直拖了很久的事，如果你也是那就不要等了，馬上安排！ 如果你也準備旅行，可以試試Saily，出國旅行真的不能沒網路！ 下載 Saily 應用程式或前往 https://saily.com/weisway 立即使用優惠碼 [weisway] 購買 Saily 數據方案，即享 85 折獨家優惠！ 安裝前記得先確認手機有沒有支援 eSIM 功能
------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD
【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:33 情緒系統 04:53 我的旅遊經驗 06:18 為什麼你控制不住自己 09:08 1個關鍵 13:21 top5 解決拖延症的方法 16:14 精選留言
---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com
Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/
IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/
Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv
---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/91793/1/Compass%20Paper%20revision%20FINAL.pdf | Procrastination and the Priority of Short-Term Mood Regulation: Consequences for Future Self https://psycnet.apa.org/doiLanding?doi=10.1037%2F0033-2909.133.1.65 | The nature of procrastination: A meta-analytic and theoretical review of quintessential self-regulatory failure. https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/contributors/timothy-a-pychyl-phd | Timothy A Pychyl Ph.D. | Psychology Today https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xCg0UMPNsWo | The Science Behind Why You Procrastinate with Dr. Timothy Pychyl - YouTube https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/SMART%E5%8E%9F%E5%88%99 | SMART原則 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://jamesclear.com/procrastination?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Procrastination: A Brief Guide on How to Stop Procrastinating https://www.edb.gov.hk/attachment/tc/curriculum-development/kla/pshe/references-and-resources/economics/3_Behavioral_Economics_L&T.pdf | 行為經濟學Behavioral Economics https://jamesclear.com/ivy-lee | The Ivy Lee Method: The Daily Routine for Peak Productivity https://apertureneuro.org/article/138339-brain-bases-of-real-time-social-interaction-a-meta-analytic-investigation-of-human-neuroimaging-studies?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Brain bases of real-time social interaction: A meta-analytic investigation of human neuroimaging studies | Published in Aperture Neuro https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3425/11/2/264?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Self-Positivity or Self-Negativity as a Function of the Medial Prefrontal Cortex

---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/91793/1/Compass%20Paper%20revision%20FINAL.pdf | Procrastination and the Priority of Short-Term Mood Regulation: Consequences for Future Self https://psycnet.apa.org/doiLanding?doi=10.1037%2F0033-2909.133.1.65 | The nature of procrastination: A meta-analytic and theoretical review of quintessential self-regulatory failure. https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/contributors/timothy-a-pychyl-phd | Timothy A Pychyl Ph.D. | Psychology Today https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xCg0UMPNsWo | The Science Behind Why You Procrastinate with Dr. Timothy Pychyl - YouTube https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/SMART%E5%8E%9F%E5%88%99 | SMART原則 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書 https://jamesclear.com/procrastination?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Procrastination: A Brief Guide on How to Stop Procrastinating https://www.edb.gov.hk/attachment/tc/curriculum-development/kla/pshe/references-and-resources/economics/3_Behavioral_Economics_L&T.pdf | 行為經濟學Behavioral Economics https://jamesclear.com/ivy-lee | The Ivy Lee Method: The Daily Routine for Peak Productivity https://apertureneuro.org/article/138339-brain-bases-of-real-time-social-interaction-a-meta-analytic-investigation-of-human-neuroimaging-studies?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Brain bases of real-time social interaction: A meta-analytic investigation of human neuroimaging studies | Published in Aperture Neuro https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3425/11/2/264?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Self-Positivity or Self-Negativity as a Function of the Medial Prefrontal Cortex
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wfJ9SQ0b1zI
出國旅遊也是我一直拖了很久的事，如果你也是那就不要等了，馬上安排！
如果你也準備旅行，可以試試Saily，出國旅行真的不能沒網路！
下載 Saily 應用程式或前往 https://saily.com/weisway
立即使用優惠碼 [weisway] 購買 Saily 數據方案，即享 85 折獨家優惠！
安裝前記得先確認手機有沒有支援 eSIM 功能

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
01:33 情緒系統
04:53 我的旅遊經驗
06:18 為什麼你控制不住自己
09:08 1個關鍵
13:21 top5 解決拖延症的方法
16:14 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/91793/1/Compass%20Paper%20revision%20FINAL.pdf | Procrastination and the Priority of Short-Term Mood Regulation: Consequences for Future Self
https://psycnet.apa.org/doiLanding?doi=10.1037%2F0033-2909.133.1.65 | The nature of procrastination: A meta-analytic and theoretical review of quintessential self-regulatory failure.
https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/contributors/timothy-a-pychyl-phd | Timothy A Pychyl Ph.D. | Psychology Today
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xCg0UMPNsWo | The Science Behind Why You Procrastinate with Dr. Timothy Pychyl - YouTube
https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/SMART%E5%8E%9F%E5%88%99 | SMART原則 - 維基百科，自由的百科全書
https://jamesclear.com/procrastination?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Procrastination: A Brief Guide on How to Stop Procrastinating
https://www.edb.gov.hk/attachment/tc/curriculum-development/kla/pshe/references-and-resources/economics/3_Behavioral_Economics_L&T.pdf | 行為經濟學Behavioral Economics
https://jamesclear.com/ivy-lee | The Ivy Lee Method: The Daily Routine for Peak Productivity
https://apertureneuro.org/article/138339-brain-bases-of-real-time-social-interaction-a-meta-analytic-investigation-of-human-neuroimaging-studies?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Brain bases of real-time social interaction: A meta-analytic investigation of human neuroimaging studies | Published in Aperture Neuro
https://www.mdpi.com/2076-3425/11/2/264?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Self-Positivity or Self-Negativity as a Function of the Medial Prefrontal Cortex

item.title: 5.24]這超瘋的語言APP，真的能教會你英文嗎？多鄰國竟然有論文證明！【4步驟學會任何語言】
item.itunes:title: 5.24]這超瘋的語言APP，真的能教會你英文嗎？多鄰國竟然有論文證明！【4步驟學會任何語言】
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnTJ6qb_Hbc 關於「語言學習」我最深的領悟是： 「學語言要把它當技能來學，並非學習知識」。 我一直以來認為 @Duolingo 是一款很瘋的APP，都當做小遊戲在玩！ 沒想到！我以為在玩遊戲，結果學會了一門語言！
你是否也想「不小心」學會一種新的語言？ 每天用5分鐘的時間，用玩的方式，輕鬆學習新語言👇🏻 https://app.adjust.com/1oerldk9 （反正是免費的，不試白不試😎） #duolingo #語言學習 #學日語 #英文
------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD
【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:03 學習語言的真正秘訣 05:44 Duolingo 真的有用嗎 07:24 語言學習的理論 11:03 語言學習的步驟 12:08 精選留言
---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com
Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/
IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/
Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv
---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://research.duolingo.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Research - Duolingo https://scholarspace.manoa.hawaii.edu/server/api/core/bitstreams/ea47a53e-da6e-4419-bd55-e72b458294f4/content | The effectiveness of Duolingo in developing receptive and productive language knowledge and proficiency https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/EJ1135889.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com | EJ1135889.pdf https://www.irrodl.org/index.php/irrodl/article/view/7677 | The Effects of Duolingo, an AI-Integrated Technology, on EFL Learners’ Willingness to Communicate and Engagement in Online Classes | The International Review of Research in Open and Distributed Learning https://duolingo-papers.s3.amazonaws.com/reports/Duolingo_whitepaper_language_read_listen_2021.pdf | Finishing half of B1 on Duolingo comparable to five university semesters in reading and listening
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnTJ6qb_Hbc 關於「語言學習」我最深的領悟是： 「學語言要把它當技能來學，並非學習知識」。 我一直以來認為 @Duolingo 是一款很瘋的APP，都當做小遊戲在玩！ 沒想到！我以為在玩遊戲，結果學會了一門語言！
你是否也想「不小心」學會一種新的語言？ 每天用5分鐘的時間，用玩的方式，輕鬆學習新語言👇🏻 https://app.adjust.com/1oerldk9 （反正是免費的，不試白不試😎） #duolingo #語言學習 #學日語 #英文
------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD
【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:03 學習語言的真正秘訣 05:44 Duolingo 真的有用嗎 07:24 語言學習的理論 11:03 語言學習的步驟 12:08 精選留言
---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com
Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/
IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/
Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv
---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://research.duolingo.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Research - Duolingo https://scholarspace.manoa.hawaii.edu/server/api/core/bitstreams/ea47a53e-da6e-4419-bd55-e72b458294f4/content | The effectiveness of Duolingo in developing receptive and productive language knowledge and proficiency https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/EJ1135889.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com | EJ1135889.pdf https://www.irrodl.org/index.php/irrodl/article/view/7677 | The Effects of Duolingo, an AI-Integrated Technology, on EFL Learners’ Willingness to Communicate and Engagement in Online Classes | The International Review of Research in Open and Distributed Learning https://duolingo-papers.s3.amazonaws.com/reports/Duolingo_whitepaper_language_read_listen_2021.pdf | Finishing half of B1 on Duolingo comparable to five university semesters in reading and listening
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gnTJ6qb_Hbc
關於「語言學習」我最深的領悟是：
「學語言要把它當技能來學，並非學習知識」。
我一直以來認為 @Duolingo 是一款很瘋的APP，都當做小遊戲在玩！
沒想到！我以為在玩遊戲，結果學會了一門語言！

你是否也想「不小心」學會一種新的語言？
每天用5分鐘的時間，用玩的方式，輕鬆學習新語言👇🏻
https://app.adjust.com/1oerldk9
（反正是免費的，不試白不試😎）
#duolingo #語言學習 #學日語  #英文 

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 介紹
01:03 學習語言的真正秘訣
05:44 Duolingo 真的有用嗎
07:24 語言學習的理論
11:03 語言學習的步驟
12:08 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://research.duolingo.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com | Research - Duolingo
https://scholarspace.manoa.hawaii.edu/server/api/core/bitstreams/ea47a53e-da6e-4419-bd55-e72b458294f4/content | The effectiveness of Duolingo in developing receptive and productive language knowledge and proficiency
https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/EJ1135889.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com | EJ1135889.pdf
https://www.irrodl.org/index.php/irrodl/article/view/7677 | The Effects of Duolingo, an AI-Integrated Technology, on EFL Learners’ Willingness to Communicate and Engagement in Online Classes | The International Review of Research in Open and Distributed Learning
https://duolingo-papers.s3.amazonaws.com/reports/Duolingo_whitepaper_language_read_listen_2021.pdf | Finishing half of B1 on Duolingo comparable to five university semesters in reading and listening

item.title: 4.12]如何0.2秒識破對方在說謊！解讀臉部「微表情」看穿真實心理【心理學】
item.itunes:title: 4.12]如何0.2秒識破對方在說謊！解讀臉部「微表情」看穿真實心理【心理學】
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pe6QArXnPLM 微表情線上課程：https://www.pressplay.cc/link/s/D35DBDF3 專屬折扣碼：WEIS250
------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD
【目錄】 00:00 介紹 01:47 什麼是微表情 03:43 7種表情的意思 07:30 看穿微表情的例子 10:36 如何訓練察覺微表情 13:56 精選留言
---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com
Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/
IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/
Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv
---------------------------- 【推薦你的影片】 你有「反社會人格」？：https://bit.ly/38UyyNd 為什麼鏡子裡的你比照片好看！https://bit.ly/2WaJDEM 如何控制夢？ ： https://bit.ly/2AQZb9l 為什麼聽自己錄音會覺得難聽？https://bit.ly/3elDRXh 失眠？這樣做！: https://bit.ly/2Cm6DJT 你到底是「內向」還是「社交恐懼症」！：https://bit.ly/2OgD9Qn
